current_entries.en_definition: Not crooked, curly, or bent; having a constant direction throughout its length. [from 14th c.]

Something that is not crooked or bent such as a part of a road or track.

current_entries.en_definition: A particular way in which one grooms, adorns, dresses, or carries oneself; (specifically) a way thought to be attractive or fashionable.
(by extension from sense 1.1) A particular manner of expression in writing or speech, especially one regarded as good.
A particular manner of creating, doing, or presenting something, especially a work of architecture or art.

Placed in a lower class, rank, or position.

(intransitive) To be enough or sufficient; to meet the need (of anything); to be adequate; to be good enough.

A band of fabric worn around the wrist or head during sports to absorb perspiration.

(historical) An ancient city and former polity under the Xia dynasty in present-day Wugong, Xianyang, Shaanxi, China.

(of wine) high or too high in acidity.

A word or phrase (e.g., noun phrase, verb phrase, open compound), especially one from a specialised area of knowledge; a name for a concept.
Relations among people.

(entomology, and, arachnology) The middle of three distinct divisions in an insect, crustacean or arachnid body to which the legs are attached.
(archaic, dialectal, literary, religion) . [chiefly up to early 17th c.]

(transitive) To power up, to put into operation, to start, to activate (an appliance, light, mechanism, functionality etc.).

Any inhabitant of the Americas.

An animal of the Amphibia; any vertebrate that does not have amniotic eggs, living both on land and in water.

examples.english: Today is June 18th and it is Muiriel's birthday!

current_entries.en_definition: Used to connect certain numbers: connecting units when they precede tens (now dated); connecting shillings to pence in a monetary quantity (now historical); connecting tens and units to hundreds, thousands etc. (now often omitted in US); to connect fractions to wholes. [from 10th c.]
(now, colloquial, or, literary) Used to connect more than two elements together in a chain, sometimes to stress the number of elements.

(Greek mythology) The daughter of Cepheus and Cassiopeia, king and queen of Eritrea, rescued from her sacrifice to the sea monster Cetus by Perseus, who married her; mother of Perses, ancient king of Persia.

(constellation) A constellation of the northern sky representing the "chained woman" Andromeda in Greek mythology, which is surrounded by the constellations of Cassiopeia, Perseus, and Pegasus, among others.
A ring- or donut-shaped area, object, or structure.

(astronomy) A ring of light in a celestial body, especially when caused by an annular eclipse (for example, when the Sun and Moon are in line with the Earth, but the Moon does not completely cover the Sun's disc).

(botany) A structure surrounding a sporangium (or part of it) which shrinks and causes it to rupture for spore dispersal; specifically, in a fern: a structure around about two-thirds of the sporangium consisting of differentially thick-walled cells which dry and distort the sporangium; and in a moss: a complete ring of cells around the tip of the sporangium which dissolves to cause the tip to detach.
(geometry) The region in a plane between two concentric circles of different radii.
(topology) Any topological space homeomorphic to the region in a plane between two concentric circles of different radii.
(anatomy) Nearer the forward end, especially in the front of the body; nearer the head or forepart of an animal.
(formal) Coming before or earlier in time or development, prior to, preceding.
To even the slightest extent, at all.

examples.english: I don't want to hear any more of your complaining.
examples.chinese: 我不想再听你抱怨了。

current_entries.en_definition: (negative polarity item, or, interrogative, chiefly with plural or uncountable nouns) One at all; at least one; at least one kind of; some; a positive quantity of.
A/an, each or some, no matter its/their identity or nature.
Any thing(s) or person(s).
A primate of the superfamily Hominoidea, generally larger than monkeys and distinguished from them by having no tail.
(derogatory) An uncivilized person.
(transitive) To imitate or mimic, particularly to imitate poorly.
(countable, biblical) The written account of a revelation of hidden things given by God to a chosen prophet.

examples.english: What would you do in the event of a zombie apocalypse?
examples.chinese: 在殭屍啟示錄的事件中你會怎麼做？

current_entries.en_definition: (Christianity) Revelation (last book of the Bible, composed of twenty-two chapters, which narrates a vision of the end times).
Horrifying and astonishing.
Extremely unfavorable; terrible.
(also, figuratively) An act of drawing near in place or time; an advancing or coming near.

examples.english: We should approach this problem from different angles.
examples.chinese: 我們應該用各種不同的角度看待此問題

current_entries.en_definition: (figuratively) A manner of making (a policy) or solving (a problem, etc.).
(also, figuratively) An avenue, passage, or way by which a building or place can be approached; an access.
(archaic) An opportunity of drawing near; access.
Approaching; proximate; nearly resembling.
Nearing correctness; nearly exact; not perfectly accurate.
(zodiac constellations) A constellation of the zodiac, supposedly shaped like a water carrier.
(astrology) The zodiac sign for the water carrier, ruled by Uranus or Saturn, covering January 20 – February 18 (tropical astrology) or February 15 – March 14 (sidereal astrology).
(geography) Pertaining to the northern polar region of the planet, characterised by extreme cold and an icy landscape. [from 16th c.]

examples.english: A few months later they return to their breeding grounds in the Arctic.
examples.chinese: 數月後，牠們回到了北極的繁殖地。

current_entries.en_definition: Extremely cold, snowy, or having other properties of extreme winter associated with the Arctic. [from 16th c.]
A continental region consisting of the portion of the Earth north of the Arctic Circle, containing the North Pole. [from 17th c.]
A citizen or descendant abroad of Argentina.
(dance) Ellipsis of Argentine tango.
A piece of nonfiction writing such as a story, report, opinion piece, or entry in a newspaper, magazine, journal, encyclopedia, etc.

examples.english: Excuse me; allow me to point out three errors in the above article.
examples.chinese: 抱歉，请允许我指出上文中的三个错误。

current_entries.en_definition: A section of a legal document, bylaws, etc. or, in the plural, the entire document seen as a collection of these.

(grammar) A part of speech that indicates, specifies and limits a noun (a, an, or the in English). In some languages the article may appear as an ending (e.g. definite article in Swedish) or there may be none (e.g. Russian, Pashto).
As though; in a manner suggesting.
In mimicry of.
(idiomatic) Indicates that the speaker deems something highly unlikely.
A gray color, similar to that of the remains of a fire.
In a state of sleep; also, broadly, resting.

examples.english: I was so excited that I could not fall asleep.
examples.chinese: 我興奮得睡不著覺。

current_entries.en_definition: (transitive) To remove a liquid or gas by means of suction.
A person who assists or helps someone else.
(broadly) A person who doubts the existence of deities (therefore, an agnostic may be considered an atheist).

examples.english: I'm an atheist.
examples.chinese: 我是无神论者。

current_entries.en_definition: (narrowly) A person who is certain that no deities exist or who thinks that the existence of deities can be disproven.
A characteristic or quality of a thing.

examples.english: It's not fair to attribute your failure to your parents.
examples.chinese: 把你的失败归咎于你的父母是不对的。

current_entries.en_definition: (computing, object-oriented programming) An option or setting belonging to some object.
(grammar) A word that qualifies a noun.
An examination in general.

An independent review and examination of records and activities to assess the adequacy of system controls, to ensure compliance with established policies and operational procedures, and to recommend necessary changes in controls, policies, or procedures
The eighth month of the Roman, Julian, and Gregorian calendars, following July and preceding September.

examples.english: Jack was born on August tenth.
examples.chinese: 傑克在八月十日出生。

current_entries.en_definition: Awe-inspiring, majestic, noble, venerable.
Of noble birth.
Of, or relating to, or exhibiting strict obedience to an authority; favoring authoritarianism over civic and individual liberties.
Demanding obedience to authority; marked by authoritarianism; dictatorial, tyrannical.
Tending to impose one's demands upon others as if one were an authority.
Written in the author’s own handwriting.
A person’s own handwriting, especially the signature of a famous or admired person.
(by extension, colloquial) A person's signature used as a mark of formal approval.
A manuscript in the author’s handwriting.
Capable of operating without external control or intervention.
(of a firearm such as a machine gun) Firing continuously as long as the trigger is pressed until ammunition is exhausted.
(obsolete) The vanguard of an army or other force.
Any group of people who invent or promote new techniques or concepts, especially in the arts.
An ancient weapon consisting of a head that has one or two blades and a long handle.
Sky blue; resembling the clear blue colour of the unclouded sky.
(countable, and, uncountable) The clear blue colour of the sky; also, a pigment or dye of this colour.
(tincture) A blue colour on a coat of arms, represented in engraving by horizontal parallel lines.
(poetic) The unclouded sky; the blue vault above.
(US, sometimes considered, _, vulgar, slang, positive connotation) A person considered impressive due to courage, skill, daring, audacity, and/or toughness.
Any mammal belonging to the genera Meles, Arctonyx, Mellivora and Taxidea.

examples.english: That's the badger!
examples.chinese: 这是狗獾！

current_entries.en_definition: In certain phrases: money.

examples.english: Here is your bag.
examples.chinese: 你的袋子在這裡。

current_entries.en_definition: Any substance, especially food, used in catching fish, or other animals, by alluring them to a hook, snare, trap, or net.

examples.english: Before he went fishing, he dug up some worms for bait.
examples.chinese: 出去釣魚前，他挖出一些蟲子當餌。

current_entries.en_definition: Anything which allures; something or someone used to lure or entice someone or something into doing something
Having little or no hair, fur, or feathers.

examples.english: Don't worry too much, or you'll go bald.
examples.chinese: 別太操心了，不然會掉頭髮的。

current_entries.en_definition: Of tyres: whose surface is worn away.
A solid or hollow sphere, or roughly spherical mass.

examples.english: Throw the ball back to me.
examples.chinese: 把球丟還給我。

current_entries.en_definition: An inflatable buoyant object, often (but not necessarily) round and flexible.
Such an object as a child’s toy or party decoration.

An agreement between parties concerning the sale of property; or a contract by which one party binds themself to transfer the right to some property for a consideration, and the other party binds themself to receive the property and pay the consideration.
An item purchased for significantly less than the usual, or recommended, price
An artificial obstruction, such as a dam, in a river designed to increase its depth or to divert its flow.
(military) A heavy curtain of artillery fire directed in front of one's own troops to screen and protect them.

A round (cylindrical) vessel, such as a cask, of greater length than breadth, and bulging in the middle, made of staves bound with hoops, and having flat ends (heads). The word is sometimes applied to a similar cylindrical container made of metal, usually called a drum.
(of people and animals, not comparable) Not bearing children, childless; hence also unable to bear children, sterile.
(of places) Of poor fertility, infertile; not producing vegetation; desert, waste.
Devoid of interest or attraction, poor, bleak.
An exchange of goods or services without the use of money.
The goods or services used in such an exchange.
Necessary, essential for life or some process.

examples.english: I think your basic theory is wrong.
examples.chinese: 我認為你的基本理論是錯的。

current_entries.en_definition: Elementary, simple, fundamental, merely functional.
An elementary building block, e.g. a fundamental piece of knowledge.
(dated) A person who was born out of wedlock, and hence often considered an illegitimate descendant.
(informal) A child who does not know its father.
(intransitive) To clean oneself by immersion in water or using water; to take a bath, have a bath.

examples.english: It is dangerous to bathe in this river.
examples.chinese: 在这条河里游泳很危险。

current_entries.en_definition: (transitive) To clean a person by immersion in water or using water; to give someone a bath.
(military) A blade mounted to the end of a long gun, originally with a handle inserted into the bore, now usually attached underbarrel.
(engineering) A pin which plays in and out of holes made to receive it, and which thus serves to engage or disengage parts of the machinery.
A rigid structure projecting from the front of a bird's face, used for pecking, grooming, foraging, carrying items, eating food, etc.
Any plant of several genera of the taxonomic family Fabaceae that produces large edible seeds or edible seedpods.
(chiefly, philosophy) The act or process by which something becomes.

examples.english: Have you ever thought of becoming a nurse?
examples.chinese: 你曾經想過當個護士嗎?

current_entries.en_definition: a piece of furniture used for sleeping or resting

examples.english: The child was asleep in bed.
examples.chinese: 孩子在床上睡着了。

current_entries.en_definition: the ground at the bottom of a river, lake, or sea

examples.english: The river bed was covered with stones.
examples.chinese: 河床鋪滿石頭。

current_entries.en_definition: an area of ground prepared for growing plants

examples.english: She planted roses in the flower bed.
examples.chinese: 她在花圃種植玫瑰。

current_entries.en_definition: (in the meat industry, on, _, product packaging) The edible portions of a cow (including those which are not meat).
The meat from cattle or other bovines.
The Slavic language spoken in Belarus (formerly called White Ruthenia or White Russia).
A citizen of Belarus.
(transitive) To lay aside; to stop; to cancel.
(intransitive, nautical) The general command to stop or cease.
(percussion instrument) A percussive instrument made of metal or other hard material, typically but not always in the shape of an inverted cup with a flared rim, which resonates when struck.
(followed by to) To be a part of a group.

examples.english: Which club do you belong to?
examples.chinese: 你屬於哪個社團?

current_entries.en_definition: (intransitive) To have its proper place.
(of a person) To be accepted in a group.
(intransitive, followed by to) To be part of, or the property of.
(intransitive, set theory) (followed by to) To be an element of (a set). The symbol \in means belongs to.
(intransitive, followed by to) To be the spouse or partner of.
A band used as a restraint for safety purposes, such as a seat belt.

examples.english: Fasten your seat belt, please.
examples.chinese: 請繫好安全帶。

current_entries.en_definition: (baseball) The part of the strike zone at the height of the batter's waist.
A curve.

examples.english: I can't bend my right arm.
examples.chinese: 我無法彎曲我的右手臂。

current_entries.en_definition: Any of the various knots which join the ends of two lines.
(transitive) To cause to change direction.
(transitive) To force to submit.
(transitive, nautical) To tie, as in securing a line to a cleat; to shackle a chain to an anchor; make fast.
(legal) To give or leave by will; to give by testament.
To hand down; to transmit.
To give; to offer; to commit.
The capital and largest city of Germany.

examples.english: When did you move to Berlin?
examples.chinese: 你是什麼時候搬到柏林的呀？

current_entries.en_definition: A state of Germany containing the capital city.
(transitive) To give advantage to; to support; to advance the interest of.

examples.english: All the signs are that she is getting better.
examples.chinese: 一切的跡象都表示她的狀況有所改善。

current_entries.en_definition: Healed or recovered from an injury or illness.

examples.english: I have nothing better to do.
examples.chinese: 我没有其他更好的事情去做。

current_entries.en_definition: comparative of the adverb well

examples.english: It is better to do well than to say well.
examples.chinese: 說的好不如做的好

current_entries.en_definition: A vehicle that has two primary wheels, one behind the other, a steering handle, and a saddle seat or seats and is usually propelled by the action of a rider’s feet upon pedals.

examples.english: I will give you a bicycle for your birthday.
examples.chinese: 你生日的时候，我送你一辆自行车。

current_entries.en_definition: (by extension, sometimes, proscribed) Any similar vehicle powered by human pedaling or steered with a handlebar, regardless of the number of wheels.
Of great size, large.

examples.english: When we are small, everything seems so big.
examples.chinese: 我們小時候，所有的一切對我們来說都显得那麼大。。。

current_entries.en_definition: A corner, bend, or angle; a hollow
(geography) An area of sea lying between two promontories, larger than a bay, wider than a gulf.
The process of childbearing; the beginning of life; the emergence of a human baby or other viviparous animal offspring from the mother's body into the environment.

examples.english: Henry James was an American by birth.
examples.chinese: 亨利詹姆斯出生於美國。

current_entries.en_definition: An instance of childbirth.
A beginning or start; a point of origin.
(dated, or, specialised, dog-breeding) A female dog or other canine, particularly a recent mother.

examples.english: It's written abazure (bitch). Surely this must mean a slut?
examples.chinese: 上面寫的是「abazure (婊子)」。這肯定是指「蕩婦」吧？

current_entries.en_definition: (slang, vulgar, offensive, often, sexist) A despicable or disagreeable, aggressive person, usually a woman. [from 15th c.]
(pathology, dated) A diseased condition of the face or skin; specifically, bleeding under the conjunctiva of the eye, a form of skin rash, or a palsy of the face due to cold.

examples.english: The governor's recent scandal was a blight on her otherwise pristine track record.
examples.chinese: 州長最近的醜聞玷污了她原本完美無瑕的政績。

current_entries.en_definition: Something that impedes development or growth, or spoils any other aspect of life.
(not comparable) Unable to see, or only partially able to see.

examples.english: They say love is blind.
examples.chinese: 人们说爱情是盲目的。

current_entries.en_definition: A movable covering for a window to keep out light, made of cloth or of narrow slats that can block light or allow it to pass.
A small bubble between the layers of the skin that contains watery or bloody fluid and is caused by friction and pressure, burning, freezing, chemical irritation, disease, or infection.
A bubble, as on a painted surface.

A vital liquid flowing in the bodies of many types of animals that usually conveys nutrients and oxygen. In vertebrates, it is colored red by hemoglobin, is conveyed by arteries and veins, is pumped by the heart and is usually generated in bone marrow.

examples.english: My blood pressure is 155 over 105.
examples.chinese: 我的血壓為155比105。

current_entries.en_definition: (intransitive) To produce an air current.

examples.english: Make a wish and blow out the candles.
examples.chinese: 許個願，然後吹熄蠟燭吧。

current_entries.en_definition: A fatty layer of adipose tissue found immediately beneath the epidermis of whales and other cetaceans (infraorder Cetacea).
(uncountable, informal, chiefly, derogatory, and, offensive) A person's fat tissue, usually when regarded as excessive and unsightly.
(architecture, engineering, by extension) A detailed technical drawing (now often in some electronically storable and transmissible form).
(informal, by extension) Any detailed plan, whether literal or figurative.
Having a thick edge or point; not sharp.

examples.english: My sword may be blunt, but that's more than enough for someone like you.
examples.chinese: 我的剑虽然是钝的，但应付你的话是绰绰有余的。

current_entries.en_definition: Dull in understanding; slow of discernment; opposed to acute.
(smoking, slang, US) A marijuana cigar.
A relatively long, wide and thin piece of any material, usually wood or similar, often for use in construction or furniture-making.
A device (e.g., switchboard) containing electrical switches and other controls and designed to control lights, sound, telephone connections, etc.
Short for blackboard, whiteboard, chessboard, surfboard, circuit board, message board (on the Internet), bulletin board, etc.
A committee that manages the business of an organization, e.g., a board of directors.
Regular meals in a place of lodging; the price paid for them.
(nautical) The side of a ship.
(ambitransitive) To cook in boiling water.
Courageous, daring.
(typography, of, _, typefaces) Having thicker strokes than the ordinary form of the typeface.
A province of Emilia-Romagna, Italy.
The capital city of Emilia-Romagna, Italy, the capital of Bologna and also of Emilia-Romagna.
(figuratively) To attack something or someone by directing objects at them.
(physics) To direct at a substance an intense stream of high-energy particles, usually sub-atomic or made of at most a few atoms.
A collection of sheets of paper bound together to hinge at one edge, containing printed or written material, pictures, etc.

examples.english: You may have read this book already.
examples.chinese: 你可能已經看過這本書。

current_entries.en_definition: (sailing) A spar extending the foot of a sail; a spar rigged outboard from a ship's side to which boats are secured in harbour.
A horizontal member of a crane or derrick, used for lifting.
Illegally produced, transported or sold; pirated.
An illegally produced, transported or sold product; contraband.
The line or frontier area separating political or geographical regions.

examples.english: California and Nevada border on each other.
examples.chinese: 加利福尼亞州和內華達州相互接界。

current_entries.en_definition: The outer edge of something.
A decorative strip around the edge of something.
Each of the two; one and the other; referring to two individuals or items.

examples.english: We are both to blame.
examples.chinese: 不光是你，我也有错。

current_entries.en_definition: (dated, euphemistic) A mild expression of annoyance.

examples.english: I will play Sudoku then instead of continuing to bother you.
examples.chinese: 那我就不继续打扰你，玩数独游戏去了。

current_entries.en_definition: (transitive) To annoy, to disturb, to irritate; to be troublesome to, to make trouble for.
The contents of such a container.

examples.english: We'd like another bottle of wine.
examples.chinese: 我們想再來一瓶葡萄酒。

current_entries.en_definition: (figurative) Intoxicating liquor; alcohol.
A roughly hemispherical container used to hold, mix or present food, such as salad, fruit or soup, or other items.
A weave of three or more strands of fibers, ribbons, cords or hair often for decoration. [from 16th c.]

examples.english: Would you like me to braid your hair?
examples.chinese: 你想讓我幫你編辮子嗎？

current_entries.en_definition: A stranded wire composed of a number of smaller wires twisted together.
A foodstuff made by baking dough made from cereals.

examples.english: It'd be great if you could pick up some bread before you come home.
examples.chinese: 这将会是巨大的，如果你可以挑选一些面包，然后再回家。

current_entries.en_definition: Food; sustenance; support of life, in general.
Any variety of bread.
A European fresh-water cyprinoid fish of the genus Abramis, little valued as food. Several species are known.
(British) A species in that genus, Abramis brama.
An American fresh-water fish, of various species of Lepomis and allied genera, which are also called sunfishes and pondfishes.
A marine sparoid fish of the genus Pagellus, and allied genera.
(anatomy) Either of the two organs on the front of a female human's chest, which contain the mammary glands; also the analogous organs in males.
(anatomy) The chest, or front of the human thorax.
(equestrian) The headgear with which a horse is directed and which carries a bit and reins.
(military) Military unit composed of several regiments (or battalions) and including soldiers from different arms of service.
Shining brightly.
(of a colour) Both bright and saturated.
(of a voice or sound) Having a sharp, clear tone.
Of surpassing excellence; magnificent.
Highly intelligent.
(uncountable, printing, dated) The size of type between excelsior and diamond, standardized as 4-point.
Of, pertaining to, resembling or containing brine; salty.
(slang) Brother (a male sibling).
(slang, derogatory, usually in compounds) Someone, usually male, who aggressively evangelizes a person, concept or technology.
(slang) Brother (a comrade or friend; one who shares one’s ideals).
(archaeology) A period in a civilization's development when the most advanced metalworking has developed the techniques of smelting copper from natural outcroppings and alloys it to cast bronze.
(mythology) One of the classical Ages of Man, associated with warfare.
A female bird in the condition to incubate eggs; a broody hen, duck, etc.
A male deer, antelope, sheep, goat, rabbit, hare, and sometimes the male of other animals such as the hamster, ferret, shad and kangaroo.
(US, Australia, NZ, Canada, informal) A dollar (one hundred cents).
The amount held in this container.

examples.english: Fill the bucket with water.
examples.chinese: 把水裝滿桶子。

current_entries.en_definition: Part of a piece of machinery that resembles a bucket (container).
Appropriate to a restricted budget.
The amount of money or resources earmarked for a particular institution, activity or timeframe.
An itemized summary of intended expenditure; usually coupled with expected revenue.
A major city, the county seat of Erie County, New York, USA; very near Niagara Falls.
A town in Buffalo County, Wisconsin, not to be confused with Buffalo City in the same county.
An animal from the subtribe Bubalina, also known as true buffalos, such as the Cape buffalo, Syncerus caffer, or the water buffalo, Bubalus bubalis.
(US, slang, transitive) To outwit, confuse, deceive, or intimidate.
(entomology) An insect of the order Hemiptera (the “true bugs”).

examples.english: We're thoroughly prepared for the Y2K bug.
examples.chinese: 我們已經準備好應付千年蟲。

current_entries.en_definition: (slang, US, horse-racing) An asterisk denoting an apprentice jockey's weight allowance.
(chiefly, _, computing, engineering, _, jargon) A problem that needs fixing.
A contagious illness, or a pathogen causing it.
(informal) An enthusiasm for something; an obsession.
(gambling, slang) A metal clip attached to the underside of a table, etc. to hold hidden cards, as a form of cheating.
(transitive) To install an electronic listening device or devices in.
A tubular glass or plastic bead sewn onto clothes as a decorative trim
(brass instrument) A simple brass instrument consisting of a horn with no valves, playing only pitches in its harmonic series
(transitive) To form (something) by combining materials or parts.

examples.english: He likes to build model planes.
examples.chinese: 他喜歡建造模型飛機。

current_entries.en_definition: Being large in size, mass, or volume (of goods, etc.).
Size, specifically, volume.
The major part of something.
(US, slang, dated) Very good.
(transitive) To intimidate (someone) as a bully.
(transitive) To act aggressively towards.
A tree growth in which the grain has grown in a deformed manner; a burr knot.
Wood of a mottled veneer, usually cut from such a growth.
A vessel of the capacity of a bushel, used in measuring; a bushel measure.

examples.english: Hide not your light under a bushel.
examples.chinese: 不要把你的燈藏在斗笠下。

current_entries.en_definition: (slang) The act of arresting someone for a crime, or raiding a suspected criminal operation.
(transitive, slang) To arrest (someone or a group of people) for a crime.
(transitive, slang) To catch (someone) in the act of doing something wrong, socially and morally inappropriate, or illegal, especially when being done in a sneaky or secretive state.
(transitive, slang) To break in (a woman or girl), to deflower
(intransitive, vulgar, slang) To ejaculate; to eject semen or to squirt.
To teem or abound (usually followed by with); to exhibit an energetic and active abundance (of a thing).
Crowded with business or activities; having a great deal going on.

examples.english: Life is what happens to you while you're busy making other plans.
examples.chinese: 生活就是當你忙著進行你的計劃時總有其他的事情發生。

current_entries.en_definition: However, although, nevertheless, on the other hand (introducing a clause contrary to prior belief or in contrast with the preceding clause or sentence).

examples.english: I'd be unhappy, but I wouldn't kill myself.
examples.chinese: 我会不高兴，但我不会自杀。

current_entries.en_definition: (obsolete) Except with; unless with; without.
(slang, originally, _, Polari) Very masculine, with a masculine appearance or attitude.
(clothing) A knob or disc that is passed through a loop or (buttonhole), serving as a fastener. [from mid-13th c.]

examples.english: You have only to touch the button.
examples.chinese: 您只要按一下按钮。

current_entries.en_definition: A mechanical device designed to be pressed with a finger in order to open or close an electric circuit or to activate a mechanism.
(graphical user interface) An on-screen control that can be selected as an activator of an attached function.
(botany) A bud.
(transitive, archaic) To suffer consequences for (something) through being deprived of something; to pay for (something one has done).

examples.english: It's a pity that you can't buy miracles like you would buy potatoes.
examples.chinese: 可惜我们不能像买土豆一样买奇迹。

current_entries.en_definition: (idiomatic) Certainly not; definitely not; not at all.
A replacement road for obsolete road that is no longer in use because devastating natural disasters (earthquakes, tsunamis, landslides).
(medicine) An alternative passage created to divert a bodily fluid around a damaged organ; the surgical procedure to construct such a bypass.
Any system by which time is divided into days, weeks, months, and years.
A means to determine the date consisting of a document containing dates and other temporal information.
A list of planned events.
(automotive) The part of a disc brake that holds the brake pads.
(intransitive) To request, summon, or beckon.

examples.english: Call the police!
examples.chinese: 叫警察！

current_entries.en_definition: A hardened area of the skin (especially on the foot or hand) caused by repeated friction, wear or use.

The material of repair in fractures of bone; a substance exuded at the site of fracture, which is at first soft or cartilaginous in consistency, but is ultimately converted into true bone and unites the fragments into a single piece.
(transitive) To invalidate or annul something.

examples.english: I should cancel my L.A. trip.
examples.chinese: 我应该取消我到洛杉矶的旅行。

current_entries.en_definition: (transitive, neologism) To cease to provide financial or moral support to (someone deemed unacceptable); to disinvite. Compare cancel culture.
(transitive, mathematics) To remove a common factor from both the numerator and denominator of a fraction, or from both sides of an equation.
Of, or pertaining to, a dog or dogs.
(historical) A large muzzle-loading artillery piece.

examples.english: Never use a cannon to kill a fly.
examples.chinese: 殺雞焉用牛刀。

current_entries.en_definition: (Chinese chess) A piece which moves horizontally and vertically like a rook but captures another piece by jumping over a different piece in the line of attack.
(Northumbria) Very, considerably; quite, rather.
A high cover providing shelter, such as a cloth supported above an object, particularly over a bed.
Any overhanging or projecting roof structure, typically over entrances or doors.
(physiology) A membranous envelope.

examples.english: This building is a capsule hotel lodging men and women.
examples.chinese: 那个建筑物是男女都可以住宿的胶囊酒店。

current_entries.en_definition: (botany) A type of simple, dehiscent, dry fruit (seed-case) produced by many species of flowering plants, such as poppy, lily, orchid, willow and cotton.
(astronautics) A detachable part of a rocket or spacecraft (usually in the nose) containing the crew's living space.
(pharmacy) A small container containing a dose of medicine.
An army officer with a rank between the most senior grade of lieutenant and major.

A commissioned officer in the United States Navy, Coast Guard, NOAA Corps, or PHS Corps of a grade superior to a commander and junior to a rear admiral (lower half). A captain is equal in grade or rank to a United States Army, Marine Corps, or Air Force colonel.
One of the athletes on a sports team who is designated to make decisions, and is allowed to speak for his team with a referee or official.
One held prisoner.
A captive insurance company, a subsidiary of a company used as its internal insurer.
(transitive) To remove or take control of an opponent’s piece in a game (e.g., chess, go, checkers).

examples.english: To be honest, we came to capture you.
examples.chinese: 老实说，我们是来抓你的。

current_entries.en_definition: Any flat, normally rectangular piece of stiff paper, plastic, etc.

examples.english: Can I pay by credit card?
examples.chinese: 我可以用信用卡付帳嗎?

current_entries.en_definition: (Roman Catholic) One of the officials appointed by the pope in the Roman Catholic Church, ranking only below the pope, equal to the patriarchs, constituting the special college which elects the pope.

Any of various species of New-World passerine songbird in the genus Cardinalis, or in the family Cardinalidae more generally, or of similar appearance and once considered to be related to the former; so called because of their red plumage. (See Wikipedia article for taxonomical information.)
(nautical, transitive) To heave a ship down on one side so as to expose the other, in order to clean it of barnacles and weed, or to repair it below the water line.
(nautical, intransitive) To tilt on one side.
One of the teeth used by a carnivore for shearing flesh, being the last upper premolar and the first lower molar.
Any of various freshwater fish of the family Cyprinidae; specifically the common carp, Cyprinus carpio.
A surname originating as an occupation derived from the trade name carpenter.

examples.english: My grandfather is a carpenter.
examples.chinese: 我爺爺是個木匠。

current_entries.en_definition: A person skilled at carpentry, the trade of cutting and joining timber in order to construct buildings or other structures.

(nautical) A senior rating in ships responsible for all the woodwork onboard; in the days of sail, a warrant officer responsible for the hull, masts, spars and boats of a ship, and whose responsibility was to sound the well to see if the ship was making water.
(zoology) A carpenter bee.
(transitive) To lift (something) and take it to another place; to transport (something) by lifting.

examples.english: Can I carry this on the plane?
examples.chinese: 我能把這個東西带到飞機上嗎？

current_entries.en_definition: In a manner receiving direct payment by cash, often without paying tax.
(Britain) An urn.
A carnivorous, four-legged, generally furry domesticated species (Felis catus) of feline animal, commonly kept as a house pet. [from 8th c.]

examples.english: My pet cat died yesterday.
examples.chinese: 我養的貓昨天死了。

current_entries.en_definition: A systematic list of books, names, pictures, etc.
(US) A book printed periodically by a college, university, or other institution that gives a definitive description of the institution, its history, courses and degrees offered, etc.
(music) A complete list of a recording artist's or a composer's songs.
The principal church serving as the office (and some as place of residence) of an archdiocese's/a diocese's archbishop/bishop which is symbolized by an episcopal throne known as the cathedra.
(loosely or informally) A large or important church building.
(informal, of a person or remark) With subtle hostility in an effort to hurt, annoy, or upset, particularly among women.

examples.english: Let us weigh one catty of cuttlefish.
examples.chinese: 我們稱一斤花枝吧。

current_entries.en_definition: (informal) Resembling or characteristic of a cat.
(zoology) Pertaining to the tail or posterior or hind part of a body.
(zoology) Having a tail.
To apply caulking to joints, cracks, or a juncture of different materials.
(of language, etc.) Sharp, bitter, cutting, biting, and sarcastic in a scathing way.
(historical) A military man serving on horse, (chiefly) early modern cavalry officers who had abandoned the heavy armor of medieval knights.
(historical) A gallant: a sprightly young dashing military man.
A large cave.

examples.english: A dragon lives inside the cavern.
examples.chinese: 一條龍住在洞穴裡。

current_entries.en_definition: An underground chamber.
(formal, intransitive) To stop.
(formal, transitive) To stop doing (something).
The paste-like substance resulting from mixing such a powder with water, or the rock-like substance that forms when it dries.

examples.english: The cement will set in a couple of hours.
examples.chinese: 水泥會在數個小時內凝固。

current_entries.en_definition: Any material with strong adhesive and cohesive properties such as binding agents, glues, grout.
Being in the centre.

examples.english: Which way is Central Park?
examples.chinese: 中央公園在哪個方向？

current_entries.en_definition: Being very important, or key to something.
Having or containing the centre of something.
A type of grass (such as wheat, rice or oats) cultivated for its edible grains.
The grains of such a grass.
